title: 大学英语六级（CET-6）翻译核心复习笔记
body:
1. 中国传统文化与习俗

1. 核心词汇表（Vocabulary）

中文词汇 高分英文表达 备注/词性
非物质文化遗产 intangible cultural heritage 名词短语，极高频
农历/阴历 lunar calendar 名词短语
发源地 birthplace / cradle 名词
象征 symbolize / stand for 动词
儒家思想 Confucianism 专有名词
传统美德 traditional virtues 名词短语
继承和发扬 inherit and carry forward 动词短语
祭拜祖先 worship ancestors 动词短语
吉祥物 mascot / auspicious symbol 名词
剪纸 paper-cutting 名词，常见传统艺术

2. 万能高分句型（Syntax）

  • 句型结构：非限制性定语从句（用于补充说明文化背景或历史悠久属性）。
  • 结构公式：Subject, which ..., Verb ...
  • 中英文例句：
    • 中文：中秋节有着悠久的历史，是中国最重要的传统节日之一。
    • 英文：The Mid-Autumn Festival, which enjoys a long history, is one of the most important traditional festivals in China.

3. 全真模拟段落（Mock Translation）

【中文测试段落】

春节是中国最重要的传统节日，有着几千年的历史。在这个万家团圆的时刻，人们通常会贴春联、吃饺子、拜访亲友。近年来，随着中国文化影响力的提升，越来越多的外国人也开始庆祝春节，体验剪纸和舞龙等非物质文化遗产。这不仅展示了中国文化的独特魅力，也促进了中外文化交流。

【高分英文参考译文】

The Spring Festival, which has a history of thousands of years, is the most important traditional festival in China. At this moment of family reunion, people usually paste Spring Festival couplets, eat dumplings, and visit relatives and friends. In recent years, with the enhancement of Chinese culture's influence, an increasing number of foreigners have also started to celebrate the Spring Festival, experiencing intangible cultural heritage such as paper-cutting and dragon dances. This not only demonstrates the unique charm of Chinese culture but also promotes Sino-foreign cultural exchanges.

【翻译点评】

难点在于“在这个万家团圆的时刻”，处理为“At this moment of family reunion”比直译更地道，准确传达了中国文化中“团圆”的意境。

2. 历史与名胜古迹

1. 核心词汇表（Vocabulary）

中文词汇 高分英文表达 备注/词性
朝代 dynasty 名词
皇宫 imperial palace 名词短语
陵墓 mausoleum / tomb 名词
丝绸之路 the Silk Road 专有名词
避暑胜地 summer resort 名词短语
历史文物 historical relics 名词短语
考古发现 archaeological findings 名词短语
联合国世界遗产 UNESCO World Heritage site 专有名词
宏伟的 magnificent / spectacular 形容词
历经沧桑 having experienced the vicissitudes of time 分词短语

2. 万能高分句型（Syntax）

  • 句型结构：过去分词作状语（用于描写建筑物的建成时间或背景，避免句式冗长）。
  • 结构公式：Built / Constructed in + 时间/朝代, Subject + Verb ...
  • 中英文例句：
    • 中文：故宫始建于明朝，是世界上现存规模最大的木质结构古建筑群。
    • 英文：Built in the Ming Dynasty, the Forbidden City is the largest existing ancient wooden architectural complex in the world.

3. 全真模拟段落（Mock Translation）

【中文测试段落】

长城不仅是中国古代劳动人民智慧的结晶，也是中华民族不屈不挠精神的象征。它始建于春秋战国时期，历经多个朝代的不断修筑，全长超过两万公里。如今，作为联合国教科文组织世界遗产，长城每年吸引着数以千万计的中外游客。为了保护这一珍贵的历史文物，政府出台了多项严格的法规，严禁任何破坏长城的行为。

【高分英文参考译文】

The Great Wall is not only the crystallization of the wisdom of the ancient Chinese working people but also the symbol of the unyielding spirit of the Chinese nation. Initially built during the Spring and Autumn and Warring States periods, it was continuously constructed through multiple dynasties, with a total length exceeding 20,000 kilometers. Today, as a UNESCO World Heritage site, the Great Wall attracts tens of millions of domestic and foreign tourists every year. To protect this precious historical relic, the government has introduced various strict regulations, strictly prohibiting any acts that damage the Great Wall.

【翻译点评】

难点在于“始建于...历经...”，使用过去分词短语“Initially built...”作状语可以避免重复使用被动语态的谓语动词，使前后两句实现无缝连接。

3. 现代科技与基建

1. 核心词汇表（Vocabulary）

中文词汇 高分英文表达 备注/词性
人工智能 Artificial Intelligence (AI) 专有名词
载人航天 manned spaceflight 名词短语
探月工程 lunar exploration program 名词短语
高铁网络 high-speed rail network 名词短语
移动支付 mobile payment 名词短语
自主创新 independent innovation 名词短语
基础设施建设 infrastructure construction 名词短语，极高频
里程碑 milestone 名词
扫码 scan the QR code 动词短语
尖端技术 cutting-edge technology 名词短语

2. 万能高分句型（Syntax）

  • 句型结构：With复合结构（用于表述科技进步带来的伴随状态或原因）。
  • 结构公式：With + Noun + doing / done / to do, Subject + Verb ...
  • 中英文例句：
    • 中文：随着互联网的快速普及，网购已经成为我们生活不可或缺的一部分。
    • 英文：With the Internet spreading rapidly, online shopping has become an indispensable part of our lives.

3. 全真模拟段落（Mock Translation）

【中文测试段落】

过去十年里，中国在基础设施建设和高科技领域取得了举世瞩目的成就。高铁网络的迅速扩张不仅极大缩短了城市间的旅行时间，还带动了沿线经济的发展。与此同时，移动支付已融入人们日常生活的方方面面。无论是在大型商场还是街边小摊，人们只需用手机扫码即可完成支付。这些创新成果正深刻改变着中国人的生活方式。

【高分英文参考译文】

Over the past decade, China has made globally remarkable achievements in infrastructure construction and high-tech fields. The rapid expansion of the high-speed rail network has not only greatly shortened the travel time between cities but also stimulated the economic development of areas along the routes. Meanwhile, mobile payment has been integrated into every aspect of people's daily lives. Whether in large shopping malls or at street stalls, people can complete their payments simply by scanning QR codes with their smartphones. These innovative fruits are profoundly changing the lifestyle of the Chinese people.

【翻译点评】

难点在于“无论是在...还是...，人们只需...即可”，使用“Whether in... or at..., people can... simply by doing...”句型能使逻辑层次和对比关系格外清晰。

4. 社会发展与民生

1. 核心词汇表（Vocabulary）

中文词汇 高分英文表达 备注/词性
脱贫攻坚 poverty alleviation 名词短语，核心考点
乡村振兴 rural revitalization 名词短语
可持续发展 sustainable development 名词短语
绿水青山 lucid waters and lush mountains 固定翻译
医疗保障 medical security / healthcare 名词短语
预期寿命 life expectancy 名词短语
缩小贫富差距 narrow the gap between rich and poor 动词短语
城镇化 urbanization 名词
碳中和 carbon neutrality 名词短语
改善民生 improve people's livelihood 动词短语

2. 万能高分句型（Syntax）

  • 句型结构：强调句型（用于凸显某项政策或努力的关键作用）。
  • 结构公式：It is / was + 强调部分 + that / who + 句子剩余部分
  • 中英文例句：
    • 中文：正是政府的不懈努力，使得数千万农村人口摆脱了贫困。
    • 英文：It is the unremitting efforts of the government that have enabled tens of millions of rural people to shake off poverty.

3. 全真模拟段落（Mock Translation）

【中文测试段落】

近年来，中国政府将消除绝对贫困作为首要任务，并取得了决定性胜利。数千万农村贫困人口成功脱贫，生活水平显著提高。如今，政府的重点已转向乡村振兴，致力于改善农村的教育和医疗条件。此外，环保理念深入人心，“绿水青山就是金山银山”成为共识。中国正向着更加绿色、和谐的现代化社会迈进。

【高分英文参考译文】

In recent years, the Chinese government has taken the elimination of absolute poverty as its top priority and achieved a decisive victory. Tens of millions of the impoverished rural population have successfully shaken off poverty, with their living standards significantly improved. Nowadays, the government's focus has shifted to rural revitalization, dedicating itself to improving educational and medical conditions in rural areas. Furthermore, the concept of environmental protection has taken deep root in people's hearts, and "lucid waters and lush mountains are invaluable assets" has become a consensus. China is striding towards a greener and more harmonious modernized society.

【翻译点评】

难点在于两次出现“贫困/脱贫”，为了避免重复使用 poverty，第一处用名词化处理“elimination of absolute poverty”，第二处用动词短语“shaken off poverty”，体现了高级词汇的多样性替换能力。
